name: lora-spec-pilot-v1
description: Frozen domain-balanced pilot prompts for the first effective-rank and correction-validity experiments. This is a pilot split, not the final paper benchmark.
construction: Project-authored prompts stratified equally across code, medical, chat, and math. Calibration and evaluation records were written independently, assigned stable IDs, checked for exact normalized-text overlap, and audited under the declared cross-split word n-gram Jaccard policy.
normalization: UTF-8 JSONL with LF line endings; one object per line; prompt text is used verbatim after Pydantic schema validation.
